topic.title: Organization Projects Page
topic.shortdesc: View disk usage for each project in your organization.

body.p: The Projects page in the organization administration area shows how much storage each project uses.

section.title: Projects Disk Usage table
section.p: The Projects Disk Usage table lists all projects in the organization and their storage usage. The information is updated once per day.

row.entry: Each project name in your organization.
Storage used by the project's Git repository.
Storage used by the project's generated deliverables.
Total storage used by the project (Git repo + deliverables).
Date and time when the usage values were last calculated.

section.note: Storage usage values are updated daily. The table shows the last daily calculation, not real-time usage.
